text: Standing in this modern, brightly lit corridor, I am drawn to the glass walls revealing a curated interior beyond. There’s a strange sense of both transparency and separation, as if knowledge is on display yet guarded. The vibrant wall inside—declaring 'R+D'—invites me to ponder the interplay between research, development, and lived experience. I’m filled with mild curiosity tinged with detachment; I am an observer, on the threshold of discovery, aware of both barriers and invitations to new understanding.
